mapper.sql: id, payment_id, payment_no, account_id, amount, balance_before, balance_after, flow_type, flow_status, remark, gmt_create
mapper.select: select from payment_flow where account_id = #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by gmt_create desc
mapper.insert: insert into payment_flow (payment_id, payment_no, account_id, amount, balance_before, balance_after, flow_type, flow_status, remark, gmt_create) values (#{paymentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{balanceBefore,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{balanceAfter,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{flowType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flowStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into payment_flow
payment_id, payment_no, account_id, amount, balance_before, balance_after, flow_type, flow_status, remark, gmt_create,
#{paymentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{balanceBefore,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{balanceAfter,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{flowType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flowStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update payment_flow set payment_id = #{paymentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, payment_no = #{paymentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, account_id = #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, balance_before = #{balanceBefore,jdbcType=BIGINT}, balance_after = #{balanceAfter,jdbcType=BIGINT}, flow_type = #{flowType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flow_status = #{flowStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
